scores.notes: Company name mostly correct but some OCR noise before it; address has multiple character errors (e.g., 'NO.S3 JSLAN' vs 'NO.53 JALAN'); date is correct but embedded in noisy text; total amount '327.00' correctly extracted. Table structure poorly preserved with garbled item lines and unclear columns. Layout reading order is somewhat maintained but cluttered with irrelevant text and formatting issues. Most ground truth fields present but with errors and extra unrelated text.
